session_summary: This session drafted manuscript/mi-spectral.qmd from scratch by walking the argument DAG, with the human opening in plan mode and supplying the full drafting protocol: section-by-section map nodes, citation-discipline reading order, trust-ordered style constraints, and an explicit ask for the AI's recommendation on whether section 6 stands alone. After the draft, render, and review, the human's role narrowed to lightweight operational steers: render an HTML copy, audit commit state, and authorize the push to origin.

coded_turns.quote: We are drafting manuscript/mi-spectral.qmd from scratch this session.
coded_turns.note: Sets the full drafting protocol: reading order, DAG walk, citation-discipline gates, trust-ordered style, and asks for a section-6 recommendation.

coded_turns.quote: Can you render it as an html file?
coded_turns.note: Operational instruction to produce an HTML render of the drafted manuscript.

coded_turns.quote: Are we up to date on commits?
coded_turns.note: Checks whether work is committed before authorizing further action.
Authorizes pushing all 87 commits including manuscript draft and preregistrations to origin.

ai_side.note: Assistant reported the review's blocking/material split, surfacing the draft's verification state before proceeding.

ai_side.evidence: all 87 commits (`1b4ba7e..82c4bb0`) are now on `origin/main`, and local and remote are in sync
ai_side.note: Assistant confirmed exactly what would be published before the human's push authorization, framing the public-record consequence.
